default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between RunPod and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and AI-assisted optimization efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is back on track with 4 new articles generated this week](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [RunPod is implementing article categorization and URL structure changes](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [GrowthX is developing a programmatic approach for GPU-specific content pages](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [RunPod is seeing success in AI SEO efforts, with revenue attribution increasing from 3% to 10%](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [The team is exploring AI tools (Profound, Scrunch) to optimize content for AI-generated responses](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Strategy

  - [4 new articles generated this week, awaiting editing](https://fathom.video/share/yPS8Y-JMhoqJFd4SP6yZHRyE6QayMfnk?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
